sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G', 'w'] and n['pixels'] <= 50:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {c} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']} children={n['children']} {center}")

print("\n=== All objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] < 200:
        print(f"  {n['color']} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
